text: Scientists can cut DNA like text — this is how CRISPR works. CRISPR is like a molecular scissors, targeting specific DNA sequences. Imagine fixing genetic errors to prevent diseases. Sounds like sci-fi, right? With CRISPR-Cas9, scientists guide RNA to the target DNA, making precise cuts. This breakthrough can revolutionize medicine, agriculture, and more! Curious about CRISPR? Hit like and follow for more science secrets!
